nasb.text: At Hebron he reigned over Judah seven years and six months, and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty-three years over all Israel and Judah.

esv.text: At Hebron he reigned over Judah seven years and six months, and at Jerusalem he reigned over all Israel and Judah thirty-three years.

cnv.text: 他在希伯崙作猶大的王七年零六個月；在耶路撒冷作全以色列和猶大的王三十三年。

ccb.text: 他在希伯仑统治犹大七年半，在耶路撒冷统治以色列和犹大三十三年。
